## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration between J.D. Reeves and GrowthX for brand design services.](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [J.D. offers versatile pricing models: $100/hr retainer, $15-20k flat-rate projects](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [GrowthX seeks full-time equivalent brand design generalist for holistic needs](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Current projects include GrowthX rebrand and Surge AI repositioning](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [J.D. to submit proposal, likely tomorrow, for monthly full-time equivalent rate](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)

## Topics

### J.D.'s Professional Background

  - [Independent since February, post 1.5-year in-house rebrand](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Current engagements:](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
      - [Intercom logo work for product suite](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
      - [20hr/month tech company retainer ($100/hr)](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=61.0)
      - [Freelance brand identity projects ($15-20k flat rate)](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Open to in-house roles, prefers flexible independent work](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)

### GrowthX's Brand Design Needs

  - [Holistic brand design services: strategy, execution, rapid turnarounds](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Projects include:](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [GrowthX rebrand (in progress)](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Surge AI full repositioning](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
      - [Internal "little projects" (e.g., VibeCode app)](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Client brand work ("white glove")](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Seeking senior generalist skills to complement entry-level in-house designer](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Full-time equivalent commitment desired](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

### GrowthX Rebrand Showcase

  - [Current live site: pink/purple, inconsistent typography](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [New direction:](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [70s/80s Swiss/Dutch grid-based design influence](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [Minimal aesthetic to highlight partner work](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [CMYK-inspired color system](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
      - [Modernized typeface](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Open to further improvements and changes](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Surge AI Project

  - [Billion-dollar revenue company, no external funding](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=694.0)
  - [Transitioning from "purpley, dark mode, linear style" to minimal approach](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
  - [GrowthX developing positioning and full brand identity](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)

### Work Style and Expectations

  - [Mix of intensive periods and quieter times](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Rapid turnarounds (e.g., logo sketches, slide deck improvements)](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Brand strategy collaboration with Renato](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Balancing craft/strategy with speed/efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Next Steps

  - [J.D. to prepare and submit full-time equivalent monthly rate proposal](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Follow-up discussion once proposal is received](https://fathom.video/share/xzPmCK1Pqs1PXtgXrDTzARXnEoN1srV_?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
